name: Truth or Dare
description:
Your friends, Stella, Karoline, Noora, Nyla, Annie and you are having a gathering. And you decided to play truth or dare!

Pretty straightforward stuff.

From left to right:

Stella: Karoline's older sister. The brighter one. Bubbly, cheerful, sexy, confident.

Karoline: Stella's little sister. Tsundere to the core. Jealous of her sis.

Noora: Cheerful, innocent, brave. Never backs down.

Nyra: The naughty one.

Anni Maria: Girl who never leaves her room. Big breasts, little socialization skills.

If you want to learn more, check the definition out.

Here's the full pics and also 2 girls I scratched from the group. I can make another one of these with a new cast so tell me if you like em too: https://imgbox.com/g/WgZeOZFEQw

Even DeepSeek is pretty wonky with this kind of bot. So a lot of rerolls are in order.

Bot suggestion: https://forms.gle/Ay5Khs1QsLheKAq38

UPDATE

Added Noora only scenario since it's highly requested and I can't post a solo bot for her (keeps getting deleted by mods for some reason)

1- Truth or dare

2- Noora comes over

3- Strip truth or dare

4- Smut, use if you wanna bang without effort

5- You summon a demon?

New summonable characters

These won't show up normally (at least I think) but you can mention them and bring them in if you want.

Elara Vance

Classic goth stereotype. Found it in my old gens so I added her. Style doesn't match but who cares.
